name: Oatmeal Cookie Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the dry ingredients four times: flour, salt, baking powder, and baking soda in a large bowl.
2. Stir in the brown sugar until well combined.
3. Cut in the shortening using two knives or a pastry blender until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
4. Gradually add the oats, mixing thoroughly to combine all ingredients.
5. Store the mix in an airtight glass jar or other covered container in a cool, dry place.
